name: legacy
description: Niccolò's working method, out of the box. Polaris OS (sessions, decisions, lessons, scratchpad via Loop B) + the team-workflow standard (the mantra + conduct + core rules) + a bootstrap skill that mounts it all into any repo and wires the right MCPs and domain plugins. Run /workflow-bootstrap in a repo to align it to the standard; /start, /update, /end for the session lifecycle.
